title: DEERC 1:14 Brushless RC Car for Adults, 43MPH 4WD Off-Road RC Truck with 7-Color LED Lights, Metal Oil Shocks, 2×7.4V High-Capacity Batteries, All-Metal Drivetrain, 3 Light Modes, 3S LiPo Compatible
features: 【50KM/H Brushless RC Car with 2840 Motor】This brushless RC car reaches blazing speeds up to 50KM/H, powered by a 4000KV 2840 motor delivering 62W of output. Paired with a 45A waterproof ESC, it ensures explosive acceleration and responsive throttle control for serious racers and hobbyists.

【CNC-Machined All-Metal Drivetrain & Gears】Equipped with a full metal drivetrain, including CNC steel pinion gears and differential system, this off-road RC truck is built for long-term performance. Precision-cut components reduce wear and enhance torque delivery for high-speed terrain handling.

【Dual 7.4V Batteries – 42+ MPH 3S Upgrade Ready】Powered by two 7.4V 2000mAh Li-ion batteries, this brushless RC car reaches speeds over 31 MPH right out of the box. For advanced drivers, the ESC and drivetrain support 3S LiPo batteries (not included), pushing the top speed to an exhilarating 43+ MPH—perfect for serious racing and high-performance fun.

【Aluminum Alloy Oil-Filled Hydraulic Shocks】The car features metal oil-filled shocks with hydraulic damping for smooth suspension. Combined with its independent 4WD system, it conquers bumps, jumps, and uneven terrain with ease, making it a top-tier RC monster truck for all terrains.

【Ready-to-Run with Premium Build Quality 】Right out of the box, this fast RC truck is fully assembled and pre-tuned for performance. From its reinforced composite chassis to its heat-sink-equipped motor and ventilated battery compartment, every detail is crafted for durability and precision. Makes an excellent gift for boys and girls aged 8+, teens, or adult RC enthusiasts seeking serious action.

【Worry-Free Support & Spare Parts Available】Your satisfaction is our priority. This high-speed RC car is backed by responsive customer support to help with any issues during use. If you need replacement parts or accessories, simply reach out to us—we’re here to keep your RC adventure running at full speed.
description: Product Description Previous page High-Performance 45A ESC for Hobby-Grade Control This hobby-grade brushless RC car features a 45A ESC , designed for future upgrades to 3S (11.1V) batteries , offering precise control and stable power for high-speed racing and off-road adventures. 2840 Brushless Motor – Built for Speed Powered by a high-torque 2840 brushless motor , this brushless rc car reaches speeds up to 43MPH . Enjoy explosive acceleration, smoother performance, and greater durability —ideal RC cars for adults. Oil-Filled Metal Shocks for All-Terrain Mastery Equipped with aluminum oil-filled shocks , this 4WD off-road RC truck easily absorbs impacts and handles jumps, dirt, grass, and gravel. This ensures smooth handling and control over any terrain. Precision 3-Wire Servo – Sharp, Fast Steering The 3-wire servo delivers fast and accurate steering, essential for sharp turns and drifting . Whether you're racing or tackling trails, this feature sets it apart as a true hobby grade RC Truck. Metal Gear Steering – Made to Last Built with durable metal gears , the steering servo withstands intense driving sessions. Combined with the all-metal drivetrain , this system ensures long-lasting performance. Next page
